openssh-server	/etc/ssh/sshd_config
openssh-server	/etc/ssh/ssh_host_rsa_key
openssh-server	/etc/pam.d/sshd
httpd	/etc/httpd/conf/httpd.conf
httpd	/etc/httpd/conf.d/autoindex.conf
httpd	/etc/httpd/conf.d/welcome.conf
httpd	/etc/logrotate.d/httpd
chrony	/etc/chrony.conf
chrony	/etc/chrony.keys
pam	/etc/pam.d/system-auth
pam	/etc/pam.d/password-auth
cronie	/etc/cron.d/0hourly
cronie	/etc/crontab
setup	/etc/passwd
setup	/etc/group
setup	/etc/shadow
crypto-policies	/etc/crypto-policies/config
crypto-policies	/etc/crypto-policies/back-ends
